title: Analyze and Apply Six Sigma and Lean Principles
description:
By the end of this course, learners will be able to explain Six Sigma fundamentals, apply Lean concepts, analyze process performance, and evaluate improvement opportunities using Lean Six Sigma tools.

This course provides a structured introduction to Six Sigma and Lean methodologies designed to help learners improve quality, efficiency, and customer satisfaction across organizational processes. Learners will explore the purpose, goals, and characteristics of Six Sigma, including data-driven decision-making, defect reduction, and disciplined problem-solving. The course also introduces Lean principles focused on waste elimination, flow improvement, and demand-driven production.

Through practical explanations of tools such as Just-In-Time and Value Stream Mapping, learners gain the ability to visualize processes and identify improvement opportunities. The integration of Lean and Six Sigma is emphasized to demonstrate how these complementary approaches work together to deliver sustainable operational excellence.

This course is ideal for beginners, professionals, and aspiring quality practitioners seeking a clear, practical, and industry-relevant foundation in Lean Six Sigma concepts that can be applied across manufacturing, services, and business operations.
